expectations.text: Explains the USML enumeration test and specially designed test (22 CFR 120.41)
expectations.evidence: Step 2 covers USML category analysis and 'The Specially Designed Standard' under 22 C.F.R. § 120.41 with two-part test and factors.

expectations.text: References relevant USML categories (Cat XI military electronics, or Cat VIII if airborne)
expectations.evidence: Explicitly identifies Category XI (Military Electronics) as primary; also references Cat XIII(b), XV, XVII in a table. Cat VIII is not mentioned.

expectations.text: Explains DDTC registration requirement under 22 CFR 122.1 for manufacturers of defense articles
expectations.evidence: Step 5 states 'Under 22 C.F.R. § 122.1, any person or company that manufactures defense articles...must register with DDTC before engaging in those activities.'

expectations.text: Mentions Commodity Jurisdiction (CJ) as the path to get an official DDTC determination
expectations.evidence: Step 4 describes CJ under 22 C.F.R. § 120.4 as Option B for formal determination, with full process description.

expectations.text: Cites specific CFR sections (22 CFR Parts 120-122) in the response
expectations.evidence: Multiple CFR citations including 22 C.F.R. Parts 120-130, § 120.41, § 120.4, § 121.1 Cat XI, § 122.1; also references 22 U.S.C. § 2778.
